hero.headline:
Complete Indoor Air
Environment Design
Starting from the Balcony
hero.description: Airflow, backflow, and ventilation issues — solved in one system. AERIS analyzes your space and engineers the solution.

brandOverview.description:
<brand>AERIS</brand> is an HVAC brand that integrates ventilation, dehumidification, purification, and sterilization
to engineer and operate the indoor air environment.

system.title: Integrated System Brand
system.body: AERIS is not merely a collection of air-related products. We unify airflow, humidity, cleanliness, and operational efficiency into a single system, managing indoor air environments with greater precision and stability.

engineering.title: Engineering-led Philosophy
engineering.body: The essence of AERIS is not a sentimental image of clean air — it is the discipline of designing air through technology and systems. We treat the invisible with data and engineering, making spatial comfort measurable and repeatable.

brandCore.headline:
The values AERIS commits to
for a better indoor air environment
brandCore.visualAlt: Isometric illustration of an interior with AERIS integrated indoor-air solutions

items.indoor: An approach centered on the indoor environment

logoConcept.title: LOGO CONCEPT
logoConcept.body:
The AERIS wordmark visualizes our brand philosophy: engineering the indoor air environment.

The solid uppercase structure embodies the stability, precision, and reliability of an HVAC technology brand.
The flowing motif crossing the wordmark symbolizes the movement and circulation of air through space,
and the integrated air-environment solution operating organically within a single system.

wordmark.title: Wordmark Structure
wordmark.body: The stable, composed uppercase structure conveys the trust of a technology-driven brand.

flow.title: Flow Motif
flow.body: The flowing element crossing the wordmark symbolizes the continuity of air and system.

color.title: Color System
color.body: Deep navy and blue tones communicate professionalism, cleanliness, and a premium image.

why.subtitle: Dressing Room HVAC Specialists — From Design to Maintenance
why.headline:
Poor air quality silently
accumulates invisible damage
why.description:
Mold, odor, and humidity imbalance don't appear overnight.
AERIS sets the air-quality standard at the HVAC design stage and manages it as a system — before problems occur.

drdh.title: Ceiling Built-in Dehumidifier (DRDH)
drdh.description: Ventilation, dehumidification, and purification in one unit — stable control of the air you never see.

shat.title: Ventilation & Dehumidification (SHAT)
shat.description: A single unit that combines ventilation and dehumidification — comfort without energy loss.

radm.title: Window-mounted Dehumidifier (RADM)
radm.description: A no-construction window unit that dehumidifies only where it's needed.

arms.title: Multi-function Ventilator (ARMS)
arms.description: Heat-recovery ventilation, purification, and sterilization in one — energy efficiency and air quality together.

1.title: Free Consultation
1.description: Submit online or by phone. Our team contacts you within 24 business hours.

2.title: On-site Diagnosis
2.description: We visit to precisely measure air quality, humidity, and ventilation.

3.title: Custom Proposal
3.description: We design and propose the optimal solution based on measurement data.

4.title: Installation
4.description: Installation and post-installation inspection after scheduling.

5.title: Ongoing Support
5.description: Regular maintenance, remote monitoring, and emergency A/S.

q1.question: How long does installation take?
q1.answer: Residential: 1–2 days. Commercial: 3–7 days. Exact timelines provided after on-site assessment.

q2.question: Compatible with existing ventilation?
q2.answer: We assess existing systems during on-site diagnosis and choose to integrate or replace. Existing ducts are reused where possible.

q3.question: How loud is the system?
q3.answer: SHAT operates at 18 dB — quieter than a library (30 dB). Night mode runs at even lower output.

q4.question: How does a B2B project proceed?
q4.answer: Consultation → Survey → Proposal → Quote → Contract → Installation → Ongoing Support. A dedicated PM for larger projects.

q5.question: What warranty is provided?
q5.answer: 1-year free A/S standard. Maintenance contracts include remote monitoring and scheduled inspections. Emergency A/S within 48 business hours.

contact.headline: Request a Consultation
contact.subtext: Leave your inquiry and our team will reach out within 24 business hours.

seo.ogDescription: Ventilation, dehumidification, purification, and sterilization in one system. Indoor air environments, engineered.
seo.ogTagline: Ventilation, dehumidification, purification, and sterilization — engineered as one indoor-air system.
